title: Class 1 bounded assistance baseline scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative Class 1 bounded low-risk assistance path. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish a representative Class 1 candidate payload through the registry-aligned operational context input plane.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the routing outcome.

notes: This scenario is intended to represent a bounded low-risk assistance path rather than an emergency or direct escalation path.
Exact admissibility assumptions remain defined by frozen policy and schema assets.
Class 1 autonomous execution must remain limited to the frozen low-risk lighting catalog.
Doorlock-sensitive behavior must not be represented as Class 1 autonomous execution.
Schema-governed context fixtures referenced by this scenario should include environmental_context.doorbell_detected.
